title: Osmium PvP
description: A high-performance, minimalist PvP overhaul focused on fluid combat, extreme FPS optimization, and competitive utility.
body:
# 🛡️ Osmium PVP
**The Ultimate Performance-Driven PvP Experience for Minecraft 1.21.x**

Osmium PVP is a lightweight, high-performance modpack designed specifically for competitive players. Built on the Fabric loader, it combines industry-leading optimization with essential PvP utilities to give you the smoothest frames and the fastest reactions.

---

## ⚡ Key Features

### 🚀 Extreme Performance
* **Sodium & Lithium:** The gold standard for engine optimization.
* **ImmediatelyFast & FerriteCore:** Reduced memory usage and faster font/packet rendering.
* **Entity Culling & More Culling:** Don't waste frames on things you can't see.
* **Krypton:** Optimized network stack to reduce "ghost hits" and lag spikes.

### ⚔️ Competitive Edge
* **Marlow's Crystal Optimizer:** Smooth, responsive crystal placements for 1.21 combat.
* **Auto Totem+:** Reliable safety for high-stakes encounters.
* **InventoryHUD+:** Keep track of your armor, potions, and inventory without opening a menu.
* **Freelook:** 360-degree perspective while running or flying.

### 🎨 Visuals & Customization
* **3D Skin Layers & Skin Shuffle:** Aesthetic upgrades that make you and your teammates look great without sacrificing FPS.
* **Amazing Mace 3D:** Fully rendered 3D models for the newest 1.21 weapons.
* **Continuity:** Full support for connected textures (glass/sand).
* **Spunky PVP Texture Pack:** Built-in textures optimized for visibility and clean combat.

---

## 🛠️ Included Mod Highlights

| Category | Featured Mods |
| :--- | :--- |
| **FPS Boost** | Sodium, Sodium Extra, Reese's Sodium Options |
| **HUD/UI** | Mod Menu, AppleSkin, InventoryHUD+ |
| **Combat** | Crystal Optimizer, Auto Totem+, Freecam |
| **Visuals** | ETF, EMF, 3D Skin Layers, Continuity |

---

## ⚙️ Requirements & Recommendations
* **Loader:** Fabric
* **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.10 (Compatible with 1.21.x)
* **RAM:** 2GB - 4GB is plenty for this pack.
